overview: A YouTube-inspired video platform with a creator-first economy: creators earn 25% of revenue, viewers earn 1% of their watch time daily, and businesses pay premium rates for ad placement. Every stakeholder has a role and a reason to participate.
features: Video upload and playback for creators
Creator dashboard with 25% revenue share tracking
Viewer rewards — earn 1% per hour watched daily
Premium ad marketplace (airway time) for businesses and investors
Multi-role auth: creator, viewer, advertiser, admin
Home feed with video browsing and search
Admin panel with full platform analytics and payout controls
